jobs.title: Senior Front-End Developer (VueJS / TyperScript)
jobs.rawDescription: Description The Senior Frontend Developer with Hyper Solutions is responsible for architecting, building, and maintaining the frontend architecture of Hyper’s Vue 3-based manufacturing execution platform. This platform supports mission-critical workflows used by factory operators, quality engineers, logistics teams, and customers across Hyper’s manufacturing ecosystem. This role combines hands-on development with technical leadership, focusing on scalable architecture, reusable component systems, and high-performance user experiences across mobile and desktop environments. The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in modern frontend technologies and enjoys mentoring engineers while contributing to rapidly evolving enterprise software systems. Core Responsibilities • Develop and maintain complex Vue 3 components using the Composition API and TypeScript. • Architect scalable frontend systems and reusable component libraries supporting multiple applications. • Design and implement reusable UI patterns as the platform transitions from Quasar to a custom Tailwind-based design system. • Integrate frontend applications with backend services using type-safe API patterns and TanStack Query for data management and caching. • Conduct code reviews focusing on TypeScript best practices, accessibility, performance, and component reusability. • Collaborate with UX designers and product teams on component APIs and mobile-first interaction patterns. • Partner with backend engineers to design and integrate REST APIs and real-time WebSocket event systems. • Debug production issues using monitoring and observability tools such as Sentry. • Contribute to automated testing strategies including end-to-end and smoke tests. Additional Responsibilities • Mentor team members on Vue architecture, TypeScript patterns, and frontend testing practices. • Document component standards, architectural patterns, and engineering best practices. • Participate in architectural discussions, roadmap plannin

score.reason: Perfect stack alignment: Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind, testing all core expertise areas. Senior-level role combining hands-on development, architecture, and mentoring in a fully remote position.

Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

jobs.title: Sr AI Engineer | Remote - Europe | TS/Vue/NodeJS
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bosnia, Bulgaria, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Serbia, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Sr AI Engineer | Remote - Europe | TS/Vue/NodeJS The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. As a Senior AI Engineer, you'll drive intelligent features that redefine how users build automations. You'll build AI-powered capabilities, from natural language input to smart suggestions, that make creating workflows faster and more intuitive. You'll collaborate across engineering, product, and design to bring generative AI and LLM-based enhancements into the core user experience. You'll improve existing AI integrations, develop new ones, and shape how AI powers our product. You’ll work across the entire AI feature lifecycle: Architect and implement AI-powered capabilities : code gen

score.reason: Role is fundamentally AI/LLM engineering, not Vue frontend development. While Vue and TypeScript are used for UI implementation, the primary focus is building generative AI capabilities (natural language input, code generation, LLM-based features). Alfonso is a senior Vue frontend engineer, not an AI engineer.

jobs.title: Fullstack Developer
jobs.rawDescription: Fullstack Developer – Rakennetaan yhdessä maailmanluokan työkalu maanrakentajille Ketä haemme? Etsimme itsenäistä ja motivoitunutta fullstack-kehittäjää, joka haluaa rakentaa jotain merkittävää. Liityt tiimiin varhaisessa vaiheessa – se tarkoittaa, että päätöksilläsi on oikeasti merkitystä. Haemme kehittäjää, joka: ottaa omistajuutta tuotteesta ajattelee käyttäjän ongelmaa, ei vain teknistä toteutusta haluaa rakentaa pitkäjänteisesti toimialan parasta ohjelmistoa Vaatimukset Itseohjautuvuus. Kokemus AI-pohjaisten ominaisuuksien kehittämisestä. Tekniset vaatimukset: PHP 8.x ja Laravel-framework MySQL Vue.js tai vastaava moderni JS-framework REST API -kehitys ja integraatiot Eduksi katsotaan: Docker ja konttiympäristöt CI/CD-putket Tuntemus SaaS- tai multi-tenancy-arkkitehtuurista Testauksen kokemus Mitä rakennamme Rakennamme järjestelmää, joka ohjaa päivittäin miljoonien eurojen työmaita ja liiketoimintaa. Maanrakennusala pyörittää miljardien liiketoimintaa, mutta toimialan yrityksillä on ollut tarjolla vain yleistyökaluja – ei heidän arkeensa rakennettua ohjelmistoa. Me ratkaisemme sen. Olemme pieni ja tehokas tiimi, joka rakentaa palvelua ketterästi ja yhdessä. Tavoitteenamme on olla organisaatio, jossa AI on luonteva osa kaikkia prosessejamme ja tuotekehitystämme. Uskomme, että yhdistämällä ihmisten osaamisen ja tekoälyn mahdollisuudet voimme tehdä arjesta entistä sujuvampaa ja tuottavampaa. Meillä on maksavat asiakkaat, terveet luvut ja kasvava asiakaskanta. Rakennamme nyt seuraavaa kasvuvaihetta. Mitä tarjoamme Rooli, jossa pääset rakentamaa, ei vain ylläpitämään Etä- tai hybridityö – sinä valitset Pieni tiimi, matala hierarkia, suora vaikutus Mahdollisuus kasvaa tuotteen ja yrityksen mukana Palkka: 4 000 – 6 000€/kk Hakemukset sähköpostilla osoitteeseen olli-pekka@maatop.fi Location: Remote · FI

score.reason: PHP/Laravel backend-heavy fullstack role with Vue as secondary frontend component. Alfonso is a Vue specialist, not a PHP/Laravel engineer. Core tech mismatch outweighs timezone alignment.
red_flags: PHP 8.x and Laravel core requirements, not in skills matrix
Backend-heavy fullstack role, not frontend-focused specialty
Job entirely in Finnish, working language unclear

jobs.title: Senior QA Engineer (gn)
jobs.rawDescription: Your mission The Bikeleasing Group has grown into a leading corporate group for employer benefits and mobility solutions. It consists of five specialized companies, including a multi-benefit provider, leasing and insurance service providers, as well as a retailer for refurbished bikes. With our continued profitable growth and expansion, we’re on an exciting technical transformation journey. That’s why we’re looking for you as a Senior QA Engineer (gn) . In this role, you actively help shape and drive our technology ecosystem forward. We work according to Clean Code & Clean Architecture principles, give you room to experiment, and offer flexible working hours and remote work. Sounds good? We’re looking forward to your application! You are responsible for all aspects of the testing process in an agile feature team — of course never alone, but always together with your colleagues You implement best practices in test case creation, test automation, as well as test documentation and test case management You automate test cases using Kotlin, and in most cases with the Serenity BDD framework You contribute to architectural decisions regarding our test automation setup You take part in code reviews and technical discussions Your profile You have at least 5 years of experience in software testing with a focus on test automation, and ideally have ISTQB knowledge/certification You are proficient in object-oriented approaches to test automation and have experience with Kotlin or Java, plus the willingness to learn Kotlin You have hands-on experience with frontend and backend testing (web and REST). Ideally, you’ve worked with Serenity BDD or other Selenium-based frameworks, and you’re also familiar with Rest Assured You can independently carry out manual testing, including test management, and you understand the basics of CI/CD pipelines and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) You have strong English skills (working language) and speak German at least at B2 level for communicatio

score.reason: QA automation specialist role requiring Kotlin/Java/Serenity BDD — zero Vue.js mention (F1 rejection). This is test automation infrastructure, not product frontend engineering. Fundamental discipline mismatch.
red_flags: QA automation specialist, not frontend engineer
Core stack (Kotlin, Serenity BDD, Selenium) outside expertise
Test infrastructure focus, not product development

needsReview.title: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js)
needsReview.rawDescription: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js) About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz. Team The Engineering & Data team builds innovative tech products and platforms to support the impressive growth of their gaming and consumer apps which allow Voodoo to stay at the forefront of the mobile gaming industry. Role We’re looking for an Engineering Lead (TypeScript/Node.js) to join our Engineering & Data team. As an Engineering Lead, you'll combine strong individual technical contributions with team leadership. You'll be responsible for the technical direction of your squad, the growth of your engineers, and the delivery of high-impact projects. This is a hybrid IC/manager role — you'll still write code, but your leverage is through the team. Lead the technical direction and architecture for your squad's domain Drive design reviews, set coding standards, and ensure engineering excellence Own the full delivery of complex, cross-team technical initiatives Build, scale and operate Node.js/TypeScript backend services on AWS/EKS Define the infrastructure and reliability strategy for your team's systems Partner with Product and Data to translate business goals into technical roadmaps Grow engineers through 1:1s, code reviews, mentorship and technical coaching Identify systemic risks and drive improvements before they become incidents Be an ambassador for engineering culture: psychological safety, pragmatism, and craft Profile (MUST have) 7+ years of professional software engineering experience 2+ years of experience leading an engineering team (formal or informal) Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript

score.reason: Node.js backend infrastructure lead role with no Vue.js component. Voodoo builds games/apps; this position is backend-focused (AWS/EKS). Alfonso specializes in frontend Vue—this doesn't align.

You'll have real influence on how a critical part of our product evolves, you'll work closely with experienced engineers who'll invest in your growth, and you'll be in an environment where speaking up and thinking broadly is genuinely valued — not just encouraged on paper. If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you. needsReview.title: Senior -ohjelmistokehittäjä
needsReview.rawDescription: Hei sinä Full Stackin konkari! Kiinnostaako sinuakin työpaikka, jossa on avoin kulttuuri ja vähän byrokratiaa? Tarjoamme sinun ympärille muokkaantuvan modernin työpaikan ohjelmistokehityksen monipuolisilla haasteilla höystettynä. Mikä Ceon on? Toteutamme mielenkiintoisia verkkopalveluita ja mobiilisovelluksia pääosin pk-seudulla. Etsimme nyt full stack- kehittäjää työkaveriksemme - kivaa tyyppiä, joka innostuu uuden oppimisesta ja arvostaa erinomaista työympäristöä. Tulet toimeen erilaisten ihmisten kanssa ja haluat olla mukana myös rakentamassa parasta mahdollista työpaikkaa myös itsellesi. Päivän työt suunnitellaan tiimeissä monitoimittajaympäristössä ja omaan työnkuvaa on mahdollista laajentaa kiinnostuksista riippuen. Teemme töitä konttoriltamme Pitäjänmäessä, asiakkaiden tiloissa pääkaupunkiseudulla, osittain yhdessä sekä halutessamme itse kukin valitsemassamme etätyöpisteissä. Toivomme sinulta Vähintään 6+ vuoden kokemusta asiakasprojekteissa Palavaa intohimoa koodaamiseen Mielenkiintoa uuden oppimiseen Kärsivällisyyttä haasteiden edessä Lojaaliutta ja joustavuutta takataskussasi Vahva suomenkielen suullinen ja kirjallinen osaaminen Sinulla on hallussasi frontin puolelta Vue, React, Angular, TypeScript tai muu JavaScriptiin perustuva framework. Back end -kehityksestä sinulle tuttuja ovat Java (ja spring), Node.js, PHP, Python, C# tai Scala. Olet tehnyt tietokantahommia MySQL:n, PostgreSQL:n, Firebase:n tai MongoDB:n kanssa. Docker, Linux, Ngninx tai Apache ovat myös olleet osa pelikirjaasi ja AWS, Azure tai Google Cloud ovat olleet projekteissasi vuosien varrella mukana. Arvostamme lisäksi Kommunikaatio- ja viestintätaitoja Järjestelmällisyyttä ja organisointikykyä Halua jakaa tietoa ja auttaa tarvittaessa myös muita Riittävästi itseohjautuvuutta Ymmärrystä kaikenlaiselle huumorille ja pilkettä silmäkulmassa Lisätietoa tehtävästä löydät Ceonin verkkosivuilta : https://www.ceon.fi/tyopaikat/senior-fullstack/ Laita meille viestiä palkkatoiveesi kera. needsReview.title: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK
needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK About Sentry Bad software is everywhere, and we’re tired of it. Sentry is on a mission to help developers write better software faster so we can get back to enjoying technology. With more than $217 million in funding and 100,000+ organizations that believe we’re on to something, we're building performance and error monitoring tools that help companies like Disney, Microsoft, and Atlassian spend less time fixing bugs and more time building products. Sentry embraces a hybrid work model across our global hubs, with Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays set as in-office anchor days to encourage meaningful collaboration. If you like to selfishly build things that make your digital life better, come help us build the next generation of software monitoring tools. About this role Are you ready to redefine the future of JavaScript development? Are you a seasoned JavaScript expert who gets a thrill from tackling complex challenges across the entire JavaScript ecosystem? Do you believe that AI can be a powerful partner in crafting elegant, high-impact code? If you're ready to leave the mundane behind and join a team that's shaping the tools used by millions of developers globally, we've got an opportunity for you at Sentry. This isn't your typical Senior Software Engineer position. As a key member of our growing JavaScript SDK team, you'll be at the forefront of innovation, working on everything from our cutting-edge SDKs for the React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Hono, NestJS, and beyond. You won't just be maintaining code; you'll be pushing the boundaries of what's possible in developer tooling across the full spectrum of the modern JavaScript framework landscape. In this role you will Join our JavaScript SDK team and get ready to build the future. You'll be at the forefront, working on: A Universe of JavaScript Challenges: Dive deep into our extensive suite of JavaScript SDKs, with a broad focus on framework support spanning the mode

score.reason: Location gated to Toronto with mandatory in-office anchors (F2 reject). Vue is secondary among React/Next.js/Nuxt/Hono/NestJS in this multi-framework SDK role, not primary UI development (F1 reject).

needsReview.title: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural lang
needsReview.company: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed d
needsReview.location: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural language, offering insights to SMBs they couldn't get before. We're fully funded by our sibling company, and are looking for remote freelancers in the US and full-time, onsite employees in San Diego, California (if you're into that kind of thing). We're looking for experience in the following roles: + QA: We're looking for a QA engineer deeply familiar with the software lifecycle in the age of agentic coding. You'd have a lot of responsibility, but also the opportunity to define what solid QA looks like at Ontix. + Azure Cloud Engineer: We're a mostly-AWS shop, but we have a few potential customers that are deeply entrenched in the Azure ecosystem, including a migration from SharePoint to Fabric + OneLake. You'd be leading the charge on that. + Infosec + Automated Vulnerability Scanning: If you browse new CVEs over breakfast, we want to talk to you. There's a huge demand among our current customers for continuous vulnerability scanning, both in the codebase and on the deployed edge. We have some test platforms, but would love a more robust solution we can market. + Full-Stack WordPress Developer: Our sister company is a bit old school still: If you can parachute in to a PHP + Vue 2/3 + WordPress + AWS EC2 environment, we would love to pass on your number to them. We're looking to grow quickly as our client base expands. Healthcare, vision, and 401(k) for FTEs. If you're interested in any of these roles, or would like more information in general about us, please visit https://ontix.io or email l33t@ontix.io with a few sentences describing your experience, interest, and where you're located.
